ch0-ch1.name: Ultra-dark ocean
ch0-ch1.notes: Maximum drama. Map almost invisible. Flood extent is sole data layer — ghostly blue on near-black.

ch2.name: Dark ocean globe
ch2.notes: Planetary scale. Land is silhouette only. SST anomaly fills the ocean. Wind particles animate on top at runtime.

ch3.name: Muted terrain
ch3.notes: Ground-focused. Need topography visible through soil moisture data. MapLibre terrain-v2 or hillshade tiles needed for Phase 2.

ch4.name: Dark synoptic
ch4.notes: Maximum contrast for weather data. Near-black canvas for luminous MSLP contours, precipitation blues, and particle effects.

ch5.name: Terrain + hydro
ch5.notes: Story is water flowing through terrain. Rivers, basins, stations visible. Portuguese labels at moderate opacity for geographic context.

ch6.name: Aerial hybrid
ch6.notes: Esri World Imagery at full opacity. Intimacy — viewer sees fields, towns, roads. Flood data overlaid in semi-transparent blues.
